case_title: PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS (PCC) VS. ARMINDO CRUZ et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS (PCC) SERVED DEC-07-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, ARMINDO
DECLARATION RE: OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS (PCC)
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 585.D; EVIDENCE CODE 1531, 1550, 1, 551 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS (PCC)
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $436.18 AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, ARMINDO
DECLARATION RE REDUCED FILING FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS (PCC)
DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS (PCC)
DECLARATION UNDER C.C.P. 1033 B RE; LETTER ADVISING OF SUPERIOR COURT FILING FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS (PCC)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS (PCC) AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, ARMINDO DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-15-2012
DECLARATION RE: CREDIT TO PRINCIPAL (BEFORE LAWSUIT WAS FILED) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS (PCC)
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $233.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, ARMINDO
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION RE: ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS (PCC)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS (PCC) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRUZ, ARMINDO $4,700.04 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $233.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,733.54, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, ARMINDO
